Auth._comment: Client ids are the public device-flow client ids shipped by the GitHub CLI (gh) and the azure-devops-mcp public client — reused so you can sign in without registering your own apps. Replace with your own app registration ids if you prefer.

Github._comment: GitHub CLI (gh) first-party OAuth App client id (internal/authflow/flow.go). Device flow enabled; OAuth-App tokens are long-lived (no refresh token).

Ado._comment: azure-devops-mcp public client id (src/auth.ts). Authority 'common'; scope is the Azure DevOps resource .default (+ offline_access for refresh, added by the provider).
